Always follow:
- `AGENTS.md`
- `StudentHub/AGENTS.md`
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/SKILL.md`

For import data features, follow:
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/PROMPT_04_NhapDuLieuTuFile.md`
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/CHECKLIST_IMPORT.md`

For hoc vuot recommendation, follow:
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/PROMPT_05_GoiYMonHocVuot.md`
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/CHECKLIST_GOI_Y_HOC_VUOT.md`

For hoc vuot limit, follow:
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/PROMPT_06_GioiHanHocVuot.md`
- `.ai-skills/sims-import-hocvuot/CHECKLIST_GIOI_HAN_HOC_VUOT.md`

Do not use AI features in the application logic.

Use ASP.NET Core MVC, EF Core, SQL Server, Bootstrap 5, JavaScript, CSS.

Database table names, column names, enum names and status values must use Vietnamese without accents.

Do not report completion until the corresponding checklist is reviewed.
